story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0100_10:
I’ve been looking to incorporate a serious,
once-in-a-lifetime battle into a play.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0200_10:
The Arceus Cup would be the perfect stage
for that!
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0300_10:
Would one of you kindly be my scene
partner?
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0500_10:
I’d love the challenge, but I don’t know if I’m
suited for such a role.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0600_10:
Really? I think both of you would give a
wonderful performance.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0700_10:
Reading through the script, I felt someone
else might fit the role better.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0800_10: Someone with an air of authority, perhaps.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_0900_10:
Some people have an aura that can’t
come from acting!
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_1100_10: Don’t expect much from this old lady.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_1200_10:
As these kids say, everyone has roles that
suit them best.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_1300_10:
Oh dear... I don’t think the kind of person
you’re talking about will be easy to find.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_1500_10:
I have a favor to ask of Diantha, the Kalos
Champion.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_1600_10: Hello, Geeta. What sort of favor?
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_1800_10: Would you battle me in the Arceus Cup?
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2100_10: You’re exactly who I was looking for, Geeta!
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2300_10: Geeta! I’ve a favor to ask of you, too!
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2400_10:
Will you join me in a play featuring a
once-in-a-lifetime Arceus Cup battle?
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2600_10:
As long as we have a serious battle, I don’t
mind. But I have no acting experience.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2700_10: It’s quite all right. I can teach you.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2800_10: What matters is whether you want to do it.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_2900_10:
I’ve heard you’re an experienced
Gym Leader from Galar whose fantastic
theater performs plays.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_3000_10:
I imagine I could learn much about acting
from you.
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_3100_10:
Hm... In that case, yes—I’ll take you up on
that offer, Diantha!
story_arceus_10_02000/2401_1001_3200_10:
Thank you, Geeta! Let’s make this the
greatest performance ever!
